meta.homeTitle: AOWATT Global Materials — PE and PP Resin Export Supply
meta.homeDescription: Polyolefin resin supply with verified documentation and responsive export support.

common.zhFallbackBanner: 中文版正在更新，部分内容暂以英文显示。

hero.title: PE and PP Resin Supply for Global Buyers
hero.subtitle: AOWATT Global Materials connects buyers with verified polyolefin resin grades, clear technical documentation, and responsive export support.

whyUs.heading: Why Work With Us
whyUs.qualityBody: Every shipment is backed by COA, TDS and SDS — issued by the manufacturer and verifiable on request.
whyUs.packagingBody: Pallet, drum, IBC and bulk-bag options sized for international logistics and port handling.
whyUs.supportBody: A direct contact team that handles enquiries, documentation, and post-shipment support without intermediaries.

pageHero.title: Products
pageHero.subtitle: Browse PE, PP, and related polyolefin product lines. Contact us for current availability, documentation, and packaging options.

search.placeholder: Search by name, CAS number, or category
search.empty: No products match. Try a different keyword or contact our team.

emptyState.noProducts: No listed grades in this category yet.
emptyState.contactUs: Contact us for custom grades and specifications.

inquiryCTA.title: Need a product not listed?
inquiryCTA.copy: Tell us your specification and target volume — our team will reply with availability and pricing.

productDetail.inquiryCopy: Send your target volume, packaging preference, and destination port. We will reply with current pricing and lead time.

applications.heading: Applications
applications.subtitle: Common application scenarios, with product options tailored to your processing and packaging needs.

copies.peFilm: {product} supports PE film lines that require balanced clarity, strength, and stable extrusion.
copies.stretchWrap: {product} is suited to stretch and pallet wrap where puncture resistance and uniform shrink matter.
copies.highStrengthPackaging: {product} helps packaging films carry heavier loads while keeping good sealing performance.
copies.greenhouseFilm: {product} can be used in agricultural film where tear strength and field durability are important.
copies.merchandiseBags: {product} fits bag film production for retail and merchandise packaging applications.
copies.foodBags: {product} supports food bag film applications that need dependable processing and package integrity.
copies.mulchFilm: {product} can serve mulch film applications that require practical toughness for field handling.
copies.fallback: {product} can be evaluated for {application} based on target film structure and processing conditions.

pageHero.title: Contact Us
pageHero.subtitle: Talk directly to our export team — we reply during Australian business hours.

contact.intro: Reach us by email, phone, WhatsApp, or visit our Melbourne office.

email.label: Email
email.help: Best for product enquiries with specifications and volume.

phone.label: Phone
phone.help: AEST business hours, Monday to Friday.

unlistedCTA.title: Need a product not listed?
unlistedCTA.copy: Tell us what you are sourcing and we will check availability with our manufacturer network.

guidance.requirementsCopy: Specification, purity, packaging, and destination — we shape a quotation around your needs.
guidance.documentsCopy: COA, TDS, and SDS available on request for any listed product.
guidance.logisticsCopy: Drum, IBC, and bulk-bag options coordinated with your forwarder.

pageHero.title: Why Work With Us
pageHero.subtitle: Three commitments that shape every shipment.

supportCTA.title: Need B2B sourcing support?
supportCTA.copy: Send us your specification and we will respond with documentation and lead time.

pageHero.title: About AOWATT
pageHero.subtitle: Connecting materials worldwide with quality, reliability and integrity.

about.overviewBody: AOWATT Global Materials supplies industrial and specialty chemicals to buyers worldwide. We work directly with manufacturers, hold export documentation to international standards, and route shipments through verified logistics partners.

values.qualityCopy: Documented specifications, manufacturer-issued COA on every shipment.
values.reliabilityCopy: Honest lead times, transparent packaging options, predictable communication.
values.integrityCopy: We will tell you when we are not the right fit. We will not overstate availability or capability.

items.miningCopy: LLDPE grades for agricultural films that need tear strength, puncture resistance, and stable field performance.
items.agricultureCopy: Hexene LLDPE options for logistics films requiring uniform shrinkage and reliable puncture resistance.
items.manufacturingCopy: Butene LLDPE grades for blown-film bag lines, retail packaging, and everyday flexible packaging.
items.waterCopy: Disinfectants, coagulants, and pH adjusters for municipal and industrial water systems.
items.coatingsCopy: Solvents and additives for paint, ink, and adhesive formulation.
items.logisticsCopy: Materials for industrial packaging, preservation, and dust suppression.

cta.title: Don't see your industry?
cta.copy: Tell us your application — we likely supply something close.

errors.notFoundCopy: The page you are looking for has been moved or does not exist.
errors.errorCopy: An unexpected error occurred. Try reloading the page or contact us if it persists.
